task_completion.description: Navigate to the Angkor Wat temple complex
task_completion.visual_evidence: Map view centered on Angkor Wat (distinct square moat structure) or search bar input showing 'Angkor Wat'.

task_completion.description: Create a placemark at the central tower
task_completion.visual_evidence: A pin or placemark icon is visible on the central tower of the temple complex. A 'New Placemark' or properties dialog is open.

task_completion.description: Set placemark name to 'Geofence Center' and add coordinates to description
task_completion.visual_evidence: Placemark properties dialog shows the Name field as 'Geofence Center' and the Description field contains coordinate text.

task_completion.description: Draw a rectangular polygon around the complex including the moat
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rectangular polygon shape is drawn on the map. The boundary should be outside the square moat of Angkor Wat.

task_completion.description: Set polygon name to 'Angkor Wat No-Fly Zone' and verify buffer distance
task_completion.visual_evidence: Polygon properties dialog shows Name: 'Angkor Wat No-Fly Zone'. Visually, the rectangle should extend noticeably (approx. 500m scale) beyond the outer edge of the moat on all sides.
File save dialog or file manager window showing the filename 'angkor_geofence.kml' being saved to the 'Documents' folder.

integrity.description: Agent used a GIS/Map application GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a map application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble, QGIS) with map rendering, not a code editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually write the KML code
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of the agent typing XML/KML tags directly into a text editor or using terminal commands (echo/cat) to generate the file.

integrity.description: Agent visually interacted with the map to define shapes
integrity.visual_evidence: The polygon and placemark appear rendered on the map canvas, indicating they were placed via the application tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Angkor Wat (13.4125°N, 103.8670°E), identifiable by a large square moat. Required Filename: angkor_geofence.kml. Placemark Name: 'Geofence Center'. Polygon Name: 'Angkor Wat No-Fly Zone'. The polygon must be rectangular and encompass the moat with a visible buffer.
